prompt: A high-end studio editorial portrait, half-body framing, featuring a woman in her mid-30s to early 40s with a naturally fit build. She stands facing the camera in a relaxed, confident pose with both hands tucked into her pants pockets, shoulders soft, posture upright, and a calm neutral self-assured expression. She has shoulder-length to slightly longer dark brown wavy hair with a natural side part and loose volume. She wears 3 visible clothing pieces: an olive green lightweight casual jacket with a slightly worn cotton texture, zip front and a single chest flap pocket; a plain dark charcoal or black crew-neck t-shirt underneath; and dark fitted pants with a black belt and simple square buckle. Shot at eye level with an 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field around f/2.8, keeping the subject crisp and detailed while the background falls softly out of focus. Use professional studio lighting with 3 clear light components: 1 softbox key light from the front, 1 subtle fill light to soften shadows, and 1 gentle rim light from behind to separate the hair and shoulders from the backdrop. Background is a seamless clean studio backdrop with a warm beige-to-taupe neutral gradient, smooth and distraction-free. The overall image should feel highly realistic, polished, and modern, like an understated fashion campaign or lifestyle magazine portrait. Natural balanced color grading, realistic skin tones, ultra-detailed fabric texture and hair strands, no noise, no motion blur, no stylization, no cartoon elements, no anatomical distortions, 8K quality.
